top.name: Undying Horde
top.rules_text: All your undead that die this turn are re-raised as skeletons (6HP 3DMG) on their death tile at end of turn.

channel.name: Undying Horde (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Re-raised undead keep any buffs they had

bottom.name: Army of the Damned
bottom.rules_text: Raise a skeleton on EVERY corpse tile on the board simultaneously. Each skeleton has HP equal to the number of other undead you control.

channel.name: Army of the Damned (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Skeletons also enter with +2 damage per other undead
